subcodes.first_line: O suppliant leaf! His honour Áqá Muhammad Ismá'íl—upon him be the Glory of God, the Most Luminous—in the blessed Shrine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبتهله جناب آقا محمد اسمعیل علیه بهاء الله الابهی در بقعه مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual transformation
